general_feedback: All four filled-in @return descriptions are accurate, concise, and consistent with the surrounding Scaladoc style. `addOne` correctly documents that it returns the same accumulator (this.type). The two `apply` overloads accurately describe returning the `Int` element at the given index. The `to[C1]` return description correctly references the type parameter `C1` and uses backticks consistently. Lowercase starts, backticks for code references, and one-sentence brevity are all observed.
